title: Rechtliche Aspekte bei Vertragslösungen zur Förderung von Agrarumwelt- und Klimaschutz
description: A guide summarizing the legal aspects of contractual solutions to support agri-environmental and climate protection under the EU Horizon 2020 CONSOLE project. It presents four contract types – result-based schemes, collective approaches, land use agreements with environmental clauses, and value chain contracts – within the context of relevant EU regulations.
